domain_experience: 7 years implementing ERP systems for distributors
assets: deep knowledge of distributor ERP pain points
understanding of repeated implementation and support workflows
network_access: possible warm contacts from prior ERP work
possible ERP partners, VARs, ex-clients, and operators
credibility_signals: 7 years in a specific painful vertical
unfair_advantages: strong problem-selection edge in distributor ERP
likely better workflow judgment than generic AI builders
weak go-to-market leverage under stated constraints

opportunities.title: Brokered ERP AI teardown sessions via warm partners only
opportunities.thesis: Use warm partner or ex-client access to sell fixed-scope diagnostic sessions that identify one distributor ERP workflow where AI can reduce manual work.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: The user can diagnose distributor ERP pain and propose practical AI workflows faster and more credibly than a generic consultant.
validation_plan: Draft a one-page paid diagnostic offer
Ask 3 warm contacts or partners for reaction or referral
Attempt to book one paid session within 14 days
kill_criteria: No warm channel to reach buyers
User remains unwilling to do any client-facing work

opportunities.title: Distributor ERP exception copilot
opportunities.thesis: Build a narrow AI assistant for a repeated distributor ERP workflow such as exception triage, SOP retrieval, or issue resolution guidance.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: The user knows the edge cases, language, and operational context that make narrow ERP tools more useful than generic copilots.
validation_plan: Identify one repeated workflow with measurable delay or labor cost
Mock outputs manually before any real product build
kill_criteria: Needs deep integration before showing value

opportunities.title: Warm-intro concierge pilot for exception triage to narrow product
opportunities.thesis: Run one manual AI-assisted pilot for a narrow distributor ERP pain point, then productize only the repeated core workflow.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: The user can manually deliver value fast because they already understand the workflow, and can later package the recurring parts into software.
validation_plan: Choose one workflow with frequent pain
Create a sample manual output with AI assistance
Ask for one paid pilot with fixed scope
tool_specs: optional ingestion script for sample data
kill_criteria: Pilot workload exceeds 3 hours per week

opportunities.title: ERP implementation partner white-label internal tool
opportunities.thesis: Sell or sponsor a small internal AI tool for implementation partners before attempting a standalone SaaS motion.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: The user understands repetitive partner-side tasks and can scope a tool that saves consultant time in a niche they already know.
kill_criteria: Partner wants custom consulting instead of a repeatable workflow

next_actions: Do not build a standalone product first if 30-day revenue is required
Define one narrow distributor ERP workflow pain with a fixed paid pilot outcome
Use only warm contacts or partner channels to get 3 conversations in 7 days
Create one manual AI-assisted sample output before any software build
Proceed only if a buyer or partner agrees to a paid pilot within 30 days
If no warm distribution exists or client-specific work remains unacceptable, stop pursuing fast revenue and treat this as a slower asset-later product path
